codeReview.summary: The structural rename is broadly complete: schema/table names, routes, sidebar navigation, and stale-identifier greps all line up with the new persona configuration terminology, and the full validator set passed. However, the bulk rename left duplicated `configurationuration` strings in backend copy, including user-facing validation messages, so the feature does not fully satisfy the rename-quality requirement.

issues.description: Several Zod validation labels still read `Persona configurationuration ...` (`createDraftSchema` at lines 52-54, `updateDraftSchema` at 60-62, and `importedPackJsonSchema` at 166-168). Because `requiredString()` appends `is required.`, create/edit/import failures will surface malformed user-facing copy like `Persona configurationuration name is required.`, which violates the milestone requirement to fully rename UI text to `Persona Configuration` / `persona configuration`.

Transcript extraction prompt strings still contain the accidental replacement artifact `Persona configurationuration ...` at lines 814-815 and 860-861. This is not directly user-facing, but it leaves backend prompt copy in an obviously garbled state and is a sign the rename pass was not fully cleaned up.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rename-worker skill's verification step checks only for absence of the old identifier and passing validators, but it does not require a final audit for accidental replacement artifacts in user-visible copy.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/rename-worker/SKILL.md:43-44` only requires `rg "oldIdentifier" --type ts` plus tests/typecheck. This feature satisfies those checks, yet `convex/personaConfigs.ts:52-54,60-62,166-168` and `convex/transcriptExtraction.ts:814-815,860-861` still contain `Persona configurationuration`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rename-worker skill's migration guidance is too rigid for dev-only table renames that are explicitly allowed to clear incompatible development data instead of adding an in-repo migration implementation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/rename-worker/SKILL.md:48-50` prescribes widen/migrate/narrow, while the completed handoff records `followedProcedure: false` and explains that clearing the dev deployment with an empty Convex import was the mission-approved way to land this rename (`handoffs/2026-03-30T22-51-49-628Z__rename-persona-pack-to-persona-config__32b701a6-4a83-42a6-9904-aea787d5d67e.json:68-76`).

summary: Fail: the rename is structurally complete and validators pass, but backend validation/prompt copy still contains `Persona configurationuration`, leaving one blocking user-facing regression and one related non-blocking prompt-copy defect.
